author: hibari0614
text: mitmdump is hanging on TLS connect with upstream proxy mode

author: hibari0614
text:
I try to use mitmdump to connect SSL website with upstream proxy mode, but it hanging on TLS handshake. mitidump seems did not sent handshake request to website. Below is the step that i running.

Execute mitmdump with below command  
`mitmdump -s indject_js.py --listen-port 8080 --mode upstream:https://<upstream proxy URL>:443/ --upstream-auth <username>:<password> --ssl-insecure --set upstream_cert=false`

Content of *indject\_js.py*

```
from mitmproxy.http import HTTPFlow
from mitmproxy import ctx

inject_js = '''
Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'plugins', {
  get: () => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
});

Object.defineProperty(navigator, 'webdriver', {
  get: () => false,
});
'''
def response(flow: HTTPFlow):
    if not flow.response.status_code == 200:
      return

    html = flow.response.text
    html = html.replace('<head>', '<head>\n    <script>%s</script>' % inject_js)
    flow.response.text = str(html)
    ctx.log.info('Inject script success')`
```

Try using cURL command to check mitmdump whether is work or not, but it hanging on TLS *Client hello* step.

cURL command that i execute as below  
`curl -x https://localhost:8080/ https://tw.yahoo.com/ -v`

Below is the cURL output of test.

```

The connect just stop on TLS handshake *Client hello*, no *Server hello* response and mitmdump seems also stuck.

Below is mitmdump output.

```

#### System information

Python: 3.6.8  
OpenSSL: OpenSSL 1.1.0i 14 Aug 2018  
Platform: Linux-4.9.184-linuxkit-x86\_64-with-Ubuntu-18.04-bionic
